title: HMI Item Positioner
description: An easy way to position your items for HMI compat without trial and error
body:
## Description:
Allows you to easily position your items in-game for your [HMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) compatible resourcepacks and then simply taking the outputted values and inserting them into your [HMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) script, so no more trial and error to get your position values right

## Default Keybinds:
_These can easily be changed under assets/minecraft/holdmyitems/item_addon.lua in this pack using [these keycodes](https://asawicki.info/nosense/doc/devices/keyboard/key_codes.html)_
- Y, H - X Movement
- U, J - Y Movement
- I, K - Z Movement
- R - Toggle Rotation, Switch particle render space
- N - Slower movement
- C - Nudge
- X - Reset position of whatever your currently editing
- M - Switch editor forward (Item, Hand, Hand Relative, Particle)
- UNBOUND - Switch editor backward
- Z - Toggle the whole thing on / off

### Other options: 
- Volume - The volume of the thing, who would have thunkeded
- slowMovementShouldToggle - Whether slow movement should be a key you toggle or hold
- nudgeShouldToggle - Whether nudge should be a key you toggle or hold

##
**If you have any questions or issues please either come to [my discord](https://discord.gg/yyu96tfSJw) or the [forum on the HMI discord](https://discord.com/channels/1346575587787014326/1455575591129452745)**
